<!-- Keep PRs focused on one concern. See CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

## What & why

Describe the change and the motivation.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `INSTALL.md` if behavior, options, or flags changed

For model / correctness changes, describe **how you verified it** (e.g. inspected the `.onnx`, ran the demo on real images):

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know — trade-offs, follow-ups, or related [Open Risks](../README.md#open-risks).
